meta.delta: 0.0 flat. No code changes since review #62. All 22 issues (19 carry-overs + 3 new from #62) still open. Strike counts incremented.
still_broken: overflow:visible bleed on office-floor (Office.css line 84) — STRIKE 11. Coffee station, SUNRISE artwork, cactus, ambient particle orb all outside teal border.
Triple visibilitychange listeners (App.jsx lines 859, 881, 1100) — STRIKE 11. Three separate addEventListener calls firing redundant state updates on every tab switch.
completionToast 16-property inline style block (App.jsx lines 1149-1166) — STRIKE 11.
Duplicate dead CSS selectors with single quotes (Office.css lines 91-95) — STRIKE 11.
Tab panel ARIA broken — conditional ternary render means inactive panel absent from DOM (App.jsx line 1258) — STRIKE 11.
polling-paused-pill span with onClick, no keyboard semantics (App.jsx line 1196) — STRIKE 11.
window.matchMedia called inline during JSX render (App.jsx line 1201) — STRIKE 11.
No H2 headings — section titles use div.section-title (lines 1267, 1333) — STRIKE 11.
sparkleUnseen useState has no setter (App.jsx line 721) — STRIKE 11.
Activity log filter logic computed twice per render, neither memoized — STRIKE 11.
stat-dispatch active span: onClick with no tabIndex or role=button (App.jsx lines 477-482) — STRIKE 11.
getRelativeTime duplicated in Office.jsx (lines 748-757, line 969) vs App.jsx line 55 — STRIKE 11.
tab-error-badge span has no aria-label (App.jsx line 1254) — STRIKE 11.
Array.from length 12 for ambient particles runs on every render (App.jsx line 1124) — STRIKE 11.
Mobile speech bubble overlaps Office tab toggle at 375px — STRIKE 11.
handleTabKeyDown not wrapped in useCallback (App.jsx line 760) — STRIKE 11.
StatsBar computes workers.filter three separate times (lines 447-449) — STRIKE 11.
Third inline relative-time IIFE in Office.jsx whiteboard huddle (line 969) — STRIKE 11.
Spread Array(7) allocation in Office.jsx ambient-particles (line 1654) — STRIKE 11.
footer-tagline span onClick with no keyboard semantics (App.jsx line 1414) — STRIKE 2.
stat-card sync-status div onClick when paused, no role/tabIndex/onKeyDown (App.jsx line 491) — STRIKE 2.
SOLO_SPOTLIGHT_MESSAGES lookup IIFE in JSX (App.jsx line 1292) computed every render — STRIKE 2.

suggestions.title: Fix overflow:visible on .office-floor — STRIKE 11
suggestions.description: Office.css line 84: change overflow:visible to overflow:hidden. Use position:fixed or portals for elements that need to escape (speech bubbles, tooltips). This has been open for ELEVEN consecutive reviews.

suggestions.title: Fix broken tab panel ARIA — inactive panel absent from DOM
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 1258: render both tab panels always, toggle with hidden attribute instead of ternary. Both IDs must exist for aria-controls.

suggestions.title: Consolidate three visibilitychange listeners into one
suggestions.description: App.jsx lines 859, 881, 1100: merge into a single useEffect handler.

suggestions.title: Fix 5 inaccessible clickable elements — spans/divs with onClick but no keyboard support
suggestions.description: polling-paused-pill (1196), footer-tagline (1414), stat-dispatch (477), sync-status (491), tab-error-badge (1254). Convert to buttons or add role=button, tabIndex=0, onKeyDown.

suggestions.title: Extract completionToast inline styles to CSS class
suggestions.description: App.jsx lines 1149-1166: 14 of 16 properties are static. Move to .completion-toast class.

suggestions.title: Deduplicate getRelativeTime — 3 implementations across codebase
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 55 has canonical version. Office.jsx lines 748-757 and 969 have drifting ad-hoc copies. Import from shared util.

suggestions.title: Remove duplicate dead CSS selectors with single quotes
suggestions.description: Office.css lines 91-95: single-quote vibe selectors duplicated by double-quote versions below.

suggestions.title: Fix render-time allocations — Array.from, Array(7), SOLO_SPOTLIGHT IIFE
suggestions.description: Move static arrays to module scope. Extract SOLO_SPOTLIGHT lookup to useMemo or helper.

suggestions.title: Add H2 headings to Active Workers and Activity Log sections
suggestions.description: Replace div.section-title with h2.section-title for proper document outline.

suggestions.title: Fix sparkleUnseen useState — no setter means state never updates
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 721: destructure with setter and call it on click.

suggestions.title: Memoize activity log filter logic — computed twice per render
suggestions.description: Identical filter chains at lines 1335-1350 and 1394-1403. Use useMemo.

suggestions.title: Fix mobile speech bubble overlapping tab toggle at 375px
suggestions.description: Add media query to flip bubble direction on small screens.
